title: RecconectHitBoxKey
description: A mod that helps change the key for activating the hitbox.
body:
Did you also get frustrated when you bought a 60% keyboard, want to get better at PvP, and decide to enable hitboxes, only to find that they don't turn on? I faced this problem and tried to find different alternatives but couldn't find any. So, I made my own mod! Now you can swap out the default bind (F3+B) for your custom one!

Requirements:

YetAnotherLib 3.8.0

Fabric Api: 0.116.7

ModMenu: 11.0.3

Fabric Version: 1.21.1
